elements.title: Samuel Tredwell Skidmore House
elements.contents: ... that the backyard, piazza, and balcony of the Samuel Tredwell Skidmore House (pictured) are all part of different apartments?

elements.title: Hours for Jerome
elements.contents: ... that Hours for Jerome was released more than a decade after it was filmed?

elements.title: James H. Snook
elements.contents: ... that James H. Snook won two Olympic gold medals, invented a surgical instrument, and was executed for murder?

elements.title: Angry Birds Go!
elements.contents: ... that the video game Angry Birds Go! has been compared to the Mario Kart series?

elements.title: Women Lawyers Association
elements.contents: ... that the Women Lawyers Association in Malawi has worked with Amal Clooney to create a chatbot that gives women free legal advice in their native languages?

elements.title: Aeroplane Mosque
elements.contents: ... that there is an Aeroplane Mosque in Dhaka?

elements.title: Bunker Hill Monument
elements.contents: ... that a ladies' fair raised the money to complete Boston's Bunker Hill Monument?

elements.title: Muslimah
elements.contents: ... that the magazine Muslimah offered tips for cute, sporty, and ethnic veiling?

elements.title: banana fiddler crab
elements.contents: ... that, when a male banana fiddler crab waves its appendage, only similarly endowed males also wave?
